title: Business Loan & Unsecured Small Business Lending FAQs
metaDescription: Understand common questions about business loans, unsecured financing, and cash flow lending. Learn how to get a business loan and find the right financing.

blocks.text: Find Answers to Frequently Asked Questions about Cardiff small business loans
Click here to begin your application.
Plaid is a fintech service provider that allows Cardiff to securely access business bank statements for evaluation without sharing your login information with us. Learn more about Plaid here .
Once you’re approved for a loan, speak with your representative regarding early payoff options you may be eligible for.
Yes! We are happy to add to or renew your loan once you’ve started the payback process. Reach out to your representative for help.
